name: dev-kit
description: A Human + AI teaming development workflow. Ship orchestrates a change end to end (plan in a worktree, implement with tiered subagent delegation, simplify, refresh docs, review, PR); review-pr runs a full review battery (code-review, security-review, pr-review-toolkit, and a context-chosen adversarial pass) on your own or a teammate's PR; generate-docs builds a self-contained docs site that works from file:// and GitHub Pages; handle-task-tracking defines a repeatable workflow for tracking work as GitHub issues (the durable task ledger ship delegates to).
